message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Sozialistische Wirtschaftsführung und Beschäftigung in der DDR 1985 (Sozialistische Wirtschaftsführung - Beschäftigung, DDR 1985)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13292","justification":"GESIS dataset explicitly on socialist economic management and employment in the GDR, fielded in 1985, directly addressing employment structures during the 1980s."},{"title":"Sozialistische Wirtschaftsführung und Beschäftigung in der DDR 1987 (Sozialistische Wirtschaftsführung - Beschäftigung, DDR 1987)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13293","justification":"Follow‑up GESIS study on economic management and employment in the GDR, conducted in 1987, offering detailed data on employment conditions in the late 1980s."},{"title":"Arbeits- und Lebensbedingungen in der DDR 1980 (Arbeitsbedingungen, Lebensbedingungen, DDR 1980)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13310","justification":"GESIS survey on working and living conditions in the GDR at the beginning of the 1980s, including employment-related indicators such as occupation, sector, and working hours."},{"title":"Arbeits- und Lebensbedingungen in der DDR 1984 (Arbeitsbedingungen, Lebensbedingungen, DDR 1984)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13311","justification":"Mid‑1980s GDR study on work and living conditions; provides information on employment situation, workplace, and professional status in the GDR."},{"title":"Arbeits- und Lebensbedingungen in der DDR 1988 (Arbeitsbedingungen, Lebensbedingungen, DDR 1988)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13312","justification":"Late‑1980s wave of the same GDR series; covers employment, occupation, and work environment shortly before the end of the GDR."},{"title":"Berufstätigkeit der Frauen in der DDR 1983 (Frauenarbeit, Erwerbstätigkeit, DDR 1983)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13320","justification":"Dedicated GDR dataset on female employment in 1983, covering labor force participation, occupation, working hours, and family‑work balance."},{"title":"Berufstätigkeit der Frauen und familiale Situation in der DDR 1985","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13321","justification":"GESIS survey on women’s employment and family situation in the GDR in 1985, giving detailed insight into employment patterns of women during the mid‑1980s."},{"title":"Bevölkerung und Beschäftigung in der DDR 1987 (Mikrozensusähnliche Untersuchung)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13330","justification":"Microcensus‑like GDR dataset from 1987 focusing on population and employment; includes labor force status, occupation, sector, and socio‑demographic variables."},{"title":"Bevölkerung und Beschäftigung in der DDR 1989 (Mikrozensusähnliche Untersuchung)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13331","justification":"Continuation of the microcensus‑like GDR survey in 1989, providing employment data directly before German reunification."},{"title":"Sozialstruktur und Sozialpolitik in der DDR 1986 (mit Schwerpunkt Arbeit und Beschäftigung)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13340","justification":"GESIS dataset on social structure and social policy in the GDR in 1986 that includes a strong focus on work, employment status, and workplace characteristics."}]}
